description_long: This is a large, flat-screen television with a sleek, modern design and a thin black bezel surrounding the display. The screen is supported by a wide, X-shaped stand that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The front view reveals a vivid display, currently showing an image of five modern chairs, while the back is plain and unadorned, with no visible branding or ports. The side views highlight the television's ultra-thin profile and the minimalistic, angular stand. The surface appears glossy and highly reflective, typical of modern LED or LCD televisions. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic, glass, and metal components, with a hollow interior to accommodate electronic circuitry.
description: A large, thin, flat-screen television with a glossy black bezel and a wide, X-shaped stand. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a highly reflective display surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy screen, thin bezel, and the X-shaped stand, with an image displayed on the screen.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the ultra-thin profile and the angular, minimalistic stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked back panel and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and the stand's structure.
attribute_bezel_design: thin black bezel, plastic, minimalistic styling
